user.title: BEV Insights
user.description: Pick the source sensors and battery capacities used to derive additional insights. The charging-state and mileage sensors are optional; without them the 'measured full range' sensor isn't created.

data_description.charging_sensor: Used to detect when a charge has just ended. May be a sensor or a binary_sensor.
data_description.mileage_sensor: The car's odometer, used to measure distance driven since the last charge.
data_description.capacity_factory_kwh: Nameplate / spec capacity of a fresh battery (e.g. 77 kWh for an Enyaq 85).
data_description.capacity_actual_entity: An input_number helper or sensor whose state is your battery's current real-world capacity in kWh. Change the helper's value to update all actual-capacity sensors without reloading the integration.

reconfigure.title: BEV Insights
reconfigure.description: Update the sensors, charging tracker inputs and capacity values used for the calculations.

data_description.charging_sensor: Used to detect when a charge has just ended. May be a sensor or a binary_sensor.
data_description.mileage_sensor: The car's odometer, used to measure distance driven since the last charge.
data_description.capacity_factory_kwh: Nameplate / spec capacity of a fresh battery (e.g. 77 kWh for an Enyaq 85).
data_description.capacity_actual_entity: An input_number helper or sensor whose state is your battery's current real-world capacity in kWh. Change the helper's value to update all actual-capacity sensors without reloading the integration.
